texts:
PREGUNTAS:
1. How does the MyEdenred app ensure the safety of a user's card in case of loss or theft, and what immediate actions can an employee take through the app?

2. What steps must an employee follow to successfully add their virtual card to their phone wallet using the MyEdenred app, and how many devices can they use this feature on simultaneously?

3. How does Edenred España contribute to environmental sustainability, and what measurable impact is achieved annually in terms of plastic waste reduction?
---
Your Ticket 
Restaurant 
Zero in 3 clicks!
Best things in life just 
are felt, not touched
Step 1
You will receive an email with a 
direct link to your card
Step 2
Create an account using the link in the 
email and log in with your username 
and password in the MyEdenred app 
on your cell phone
Step 3
Once in the app, follow the steps 
and activate your card selecting 
your PIN number
Step 4
Access your phone wallet from the link 
in MyEdenred app, and add your card 
to pay in your favorite restaurants
An app designed for you
Enjoy the beneﬁts of paying with your virtual card!
Any doubts? Let's talk!
www.edenred.es
Edenred España
Safety
All through the app! Block your card in case 
of loss or theft
PIN
Check or change your PIN anytime you want
Balance and movements
You will always know your balance and your 
movements details
Devices
Add your card on up to 4 diﬀerent devices
Eco
We save 60,000 tons of plastic
waste each year
